summary: See clues file for full details. 6 tossups, 3 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 6 tossups and 3 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: This figure stands at the far left of Maurice Denis' Homage to Cezanne.
examples: This figure stands at the far left of Maurice Denis' Homage to Cezanne.

clues.clue: In one painting, this artist depicted the Buddha walking down a dirt path, surrounded by florA later work by this artist consists of several butterflies against a hazy orange background, named an Evocation of them.
examples: In one painting, this artist depicted the Buddha walking down a dirt path, surrounded by florA later work by this artist consists of several butterflies against a hazy orange background, named an Evocation of them.

clues.clue: This artist's version of the Birth of Venus depicts the goddess being engulfed by a clam shell as a crowd of forest animals come to watch from the shore.
examples: This artist's version of the Birth of Venus depicts the goddess being engulfed by a clam shell as a crowd of forest animals come to watch from the shore.

clues.clue: (*) One series by this artist consists of 11 lithographs like The Gnome and Limbo; that series is Dans le Reve.
examples: (*) One series by this artist consists of 11 lithographs like The Gnome and Limbo; that series is Dans le Reve.

clues.clue: This artist created many grotesque charcoal sketches, including one of a humanoid Crying Spider and another titled Vision, and another of which is addressed to Edgar Allan Poe.
examples: This artist created many grotesque charcoal sketches, including one of a humanoid Crying Spider and another titled Vision, and another of which is addressed to Edgar Allan Poe.

clues.clue: In one of his paintings, a nude body seemingly dissolves into a flowery mountaintop as a giant figure overlooks her.
examples: In one of his paintings, a nude body seemingly dissolves into a flowery mountaintop as a giant figure overlooks her.

clues.clue: This artist was inspired by Flaubert's The Temptation of St.
examples: This artist was inspired by Flaubert's The Temptation of St.

clues.clue: Anthony to paint a coiled snake-like creature with a mournful face, the Sumerian mythical figure Oannes.
examples: Anthony to paint a coiled snake-like creature with a mournful face, the Sumerian mythical figure Oannes.

clues.clue: This artist's decorative works include the seventeen panels he painted for the Chateau de Domecy-sur-le-Vault ["doh-meh-SEE sur leh VOE"].
examples: This artist's decorative works include the seventeen panels he painted for the Chateau de Domecy-sur-le-Vault ["doh-meh-SEE sur leh VOE"].

clues.clue: A woman seems to dissolve into yellow flowers and bright blue water in one of this man's paintings of Ophelia, whom he also depicted Among the Flowers and with a Blue Cape in pastel works that show the influence of Les (*) Nabis ["lay NAH-bee"] on his style.
examples: A woman seems to dissolve into yellow flowers and bright blue water in one of this man's paintings of Ophelia, whom he also depicted Among the Flowers and with a Blue Cape in pastel works that show the influence of Les (*) Nabis ["lay NAH-bee"] on his style.

clues.clue: This artist painted several versions of the Birth of Venus, all of which feature Venus lying in or emerging from a conch shell.
examples: This artist painted several versions of the Birth of Venus, all of which feature Venus lying in or emerging from a conch shell.

clues.clue: The first half of this artist's career was devoted to lithographs known as his noirs, but by 1900 he had abandoned them for a colorful style using oils and pastels.
examples: The first half of this artist's career was devoted to lithographs known as his noirs, but by 1900 he had abandoned them for a colorful style using oils and pastels.
